notes: Post 33 did not get patched because postPatcher imported buildStableOpenPayload, but deployed maxApi.js was still the older CC7.3.2 shape without that export.
services/maxApi.js now exports buildStableOpenPayload and uses deterministic compact cp_<channelId>_<postId> payload before legacy h_ handoff.
No UI redesign, no recovery layer, no overlay, no floating hints.
Native open_app remains the product path; no visible code.run /app link is used for comments.
After deploy, create a new post; it should patch with mini-app icon again.
